description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with test and deploy stages using Rust Docker images. Add a cargo:stable job in the test stage that uses the rustdocker/rust:stable image and runs cargo test --verbose --jobs 1. Add a cargo:beta job in the test stage that uses the rustdocker/rust:beta image and runs cargo test --verbose --jobs 1. Add a cargo:nightly job in the test stage that uses the rustdocker/rust:nightly image and runs cargo test --verbose --jobs 1. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that uses the rustdocker/rust:stable image, runs cargo doc, removes the public directory, creates a new public directory, copies target/doc/* into public, and publishes the public/ folder as a pages artifact, only on the master branch. Add a build:periodic job in the deploy stage that uses the rustdocker/rust:nightly image, runs cargo install -f cargo-info, and runs only for scheduled pipelines.
